prTitle: feat: add /stats route with player stats page, global leaderboard, and history tab in GameLobby
prBody:
## Summary

- Add `/stats` and `/stats/:playerId` protected routes rendering the new `PlayerStats` page
- Create `PlayerStats` page with tabs for personal stats overview (games played, wins, losses, win rate) and game history table
- Create `GlobalLeaderboard` component showing all players ranked by wins with clickable rows
- Add "History & Stats" button to GameLobby page header for quick navigation
- Add "Stats" link to the authenticated Navbar
- Add backend endpoints: `GET /api/players/leaderboard` and `GET /api/players/{id}/stats`
- Add frontend types (`PlayerStatsData`, `GameHistoryEntry`, `GlobalLeaderboardEntry`) and API methods
- Add CSS styles for stats tabs, stat cards grid, and stats tables
- Add 11 unit tests covering PlayerStats page and GlobalLeaderboard component
- All 37 frontend tests pass

Closes #79
